reasoning: Your current limiter is poor lactate clearance and low fatigue resistance. The last ride shows you comfortably riding at 81% FTP, so it’s time to stress your system differently. This session on Emigration Canyon targets repeated exposure to lactate, which is crucial for successful climbing on the Alpine Loop.
